features.name: zero_padding_concatenation_with_slice_assignment
features.description: Code should include a concatenation of a zero literal with a part-select, assigned to a variable of smaller width than the concatenation

features.name: multiple_similar_zero_padding_concatenations
features.description: Code should include multiple zero-padding concatenations with different padding widths in the same always block, all assigned to smaller-width variables

features.name: bitwise_and_of_truncated_concatenation_results
features.description: Code should include a bitwise AND operation between two variables that were assigned from wide zero-padded concatenations
